title: centella filicaulis
intro: Centella filicaulis, also known as Indian pennywort or Asiatic pennywort, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, native to tropical Asia and Africa. The medicinal properties of Centella filicaulis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centella filicaulis include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory, and reduced stress levels, as well as potential applications in treating Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, and other neurodegenerative disorders. Centella filicaulis can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or extract, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
